title: The uncovered
premise: The weather has laid a body bare again.

stages.narration: Someone covered them, once — a sheet, weighted at the corners with broken brick. The wind has since done its patient work, and now a grey hand lies open to the sky. They were a person. Somebody knelt here and tried.

effects.note: searched the uncovered body; found only the doing of it

choices.label: It isn't your work to do — walk on

notes: the-dead cluster. Deliberately no material loot — searching finds nothing, so the choice is purely moral: honour, disturb, or ignore. Not exploitable as a loot faucet. Human-only.
